description: Add golden-file integration tests for treb gen-deploy and treb compose commands, fix any output format discrepancies found during golden file creation, and ensure template parity with the Go CLI.

userStories.title: Gen-Deploy Golden File Tests — Strategy Variants
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb gen-deploy covering CREATE, CREATE2, CREATE3 strategies and JSON output so that generated Solidity scripts are locked down against regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_gen_deploy.rs contains 6 #[test] functions (create, create_no_constructor, create_library, create2, create3, json)
gen_deploy_create golden output captures CLI stdout/stderr and the generated DeployCounter.s.sol content via output_artifact
gen_deploy_create_no_constructor golden output shows a script without constructor args
gen_deploy_create_library golden output shows library deployment pattern
gen_deploy_create2 golden output contains salt-based deployment code
gen_deploy_create3 golden output contains ICreateX.deployCreate3() call
gen_deploy_json golden output is valid JSON with contract_name, strategy, proxy, output_path, code keys
PathNormalizer replaces workdir paths with <PROJECT_ROOT>
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Gen-Deploy Golden File Tests — Proxy Variants and Error Paths
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb gen-deploy proxy templates (ERC1967, UUPS, Transparent, Beacon), strategy+proxy combinations, custom proxy override, and error paths so that all gen-deploy code paths have golden-file coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: 10 additional test functions added to integration_gen_deploy.rs (16 total across US-001 and US-002)
All 4 proxy variants (erc1967, uups, transparent, beacon) have golden tests with generated Solidity source captured via output_artifact
gen_deploy_create2_uups golden output shows both CREATE2 and UUPS patterns
gen_deploy_custom_proxy_contract golden output contains MyCustomProxy and a TODO import comment
All 4 error-path tests use expect_err(true) and verify specific error messages
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Gen-Deploy Output Format Fixes
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the generated Solidity scripts from gen-deploy to match the Go CLI's output in license identifiers, pragma versions, imports, function signatures, constructor scaffolding, and structural comments so that .s.sol files are interchangeable between CLIs.
acceptanceCriteria: All golden files from P8-US-001 and P8-US-002 have been reviewed for template correctness
Generated Solidity matches Go CLI output for: license identifier, pragma, imports, contract name, function signatures, constructor scaffolding
Proxy templates use correct OpenZeppelin import paths matching Go
placeholder_for_type returns the same defaults as Go for all Solidity types
Any template differences found are fixed in gen_deploy.rs
All golden files are regenerated after fixes
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Compose Golden File Tests — Dry-Run, Validation, and JSON
userStories.description: As a developer, I want golden-file integration tests for treb compose covering dry-run plans, dependency ordering, cycle detection, validation errors, and JSON output so that compose output format is locked down against regressions.
acceptanceCriteria: integration_compose.rs contains 12 #[test] functions
Dry-run golden files show the Execution plan header, step numbers, and component names
compose_dry_run_chain golden output shows components in dependency order
compose_dry_run_diamond golden output shows base as step 1 and top as step 4
Both JSON dry-run tests produce valid JSON arrays with step, component, script, deps fields
All 6 error-path tests use expect_err(true) with specific error messages
File paths in golden output are normalized with PathNormalizer
cargo test --workspace passes
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings

userStories.title: Compose Output Format Fixes and Final Cleanup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want compose dry-run plan formatting and JSON output schema to match the Go CLI's output so that compose output is consistent across both CLIs, and all golden files across phases 5-8 pass cleanly.
acceptanceCriteria: All golden files from P8-US-004 have been reviewed for output correctness
Dry-run plan format (header, step numbering, dep display) matches Go CLI output
JSON dry-run output schema matches Go's array structure with correct field names
Error messages match Go CLI's format for all validation failure cases
Any formatting differences found are fixed in compose.rs
All golden files are regenerated after fixes
cargo test --workspace passes (all phases 5-8)
cargo clippy --workspace passes with no warnings
